legal.disclaimerText: IMPORTANT LEGAL NOTICE: AInside.me is a SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, NOT a financial services provider, broker, or investment advisor. Our tools are for EDUCATIONAL and RESEARCH purposes ONLY. We provide NO investment advice, recommendations, or financial services. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. Users are solely responsible for their trading decisions and outcomes. AInside.me disclaims ALL liability for any financial losses, damages, or consequences arising from use of our software tools.
legal.responsibilityText: DISCLAIMER OF LIABILITY: By using our software tools, you acknowledge that: (1) AInside.me is a programming/software company only, (2) We provide NO financial advice or recommendations, (3) All trading decisions are your sole responsibility, (4) You assume ALL risks and liability, (5) AInside.me is NOT liable for any losses, damages, or consequences, (6) Our tools are for educational/research purposes only, (7) Past performance does not guarantee future results, (8) You will not hold AInside.me responsible for any trading outcomes.

chat.title: Live Chat
chat.subtitle: Real-time trading analysis
chat.welcome: Welcome to live chat. You can ask any questions about the live stream.
chat.instructions: Enter to send • Shift+Enter for new line

questions.q1: What do I see in this live stream?
questions.q4: What service do you offer exactly?
questions.q7: Do I have to give you my money?
questions.q8: What type of company are you exactly?

answers.a1: 📺 This stream shows REAL S&P 500 futures trading (/ES and /MES) with current positions, professional charts, technical indicators like VWAP and real-time operations.
answers.a2: ✅ YES, all positions shown are REAL operations with real money. It's not simulation - you can see our current capital and P&L live.
answers.a3: 📊 VWAP (Volume Weighted Average Price) is the volume-weighted average price. Blue/red lines show institutional support/resistance zones we use to open real positions.
answers.a4: 🔧 We rent STUDY TOOLS and technical indicators for market analysis. They are educational tools, NOT financial advice.
answers.a5: 📚 You can study our operations as educational material. Compatible ONLY with EasyLanguage platforms: TradeStation, TradeStation Global, and MultiCharts (PowerLanguage). IMPORTANT: For study only, not advice.
answers.a6: 💰 Tool rental: $99/month or $999/year (save $189). Includes 24/7 access to indicators and study tools. Educational use only.
answers.a7: 💰 NO. Your money stays in your broker account (TradeStation, etc.). We only rent the tools/algorithms. You maintain full control of your capital.
answers.a8: 🏢 We are a software development company specialized in CREATING trading algorithms and RENTING analytical tools. We don't handle money, we only develop and rent technology.

responses.vwap: 📊 VWAP shows volume-weighted average price. Lines help you identify institutional support and resistance levels in real time.
responses.real: ✅ YES, all positions are REAL with real money. It's not simulation - you can see our current P&L live and how we actually trade.
responses.pnl: 💰 You see the REAL P&L of our operations in real time. Every gain and loss you see is with real money, not simulated.
responses.stream: 📺 This stream shows REAL S&P 500 trading with current positions. You can see real operations, not demonstrations.
responses.default: 🤖 I can help you with questions about the stream, indicators, P&L simulator, trading strategies and more. What would you like to know?
responses.fallback: Thank you for your question. An analyst will respond shortly.
